title: Spooky Trees
description: Adds spooky trees to forest biomes
body:
This mod adds new spooky trees to forests for a haunting atmosphere.

Includes 3 distinct spooky tree types, each varying in size and shape.


Some spooky trees have hidden loot for players to discover.


![spooky trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/039b600ba3c612b83e4acd2cd74f42695dde1b51.png)

The spooky trees can spawn in forest and taiga biomes.

The faces of the spooky trees will glow in the night.

**You are free to include this mod in your modpacks**
